title: Lemon Herb Rice
subtitle: Fluffy rice finished with lemon, olive oil, and fresh herbs — built for lamb, tzatziki, and grilled meats.

ingredients.heading: Ingredients
ingredients.note: Two phases: a simple base cooked with salt and fat, then a bright finish added off heat.
items: 1 cup long grain white rice (basmati preferred)

shoppingList.item: 1 cup long grain white rice (basmati preferred)

body.html: Light, fluffy rice cooked in salted liquid and finished off heat with lemon zest, juice, and fresh herbs. Simple technique, clean result.

items: Rinse rice to remove excess starch
Toast briefly in fat for better texture
Cook covered at low heat for 15 minutes
Rest off heat for 10 minutes — don't skip this
Finish with lemon and herbs after fluffing

body.html: Serving vibe: rice underneath, lamb or chicken on top, tzatziki on the side, lemon over everything.

slides.title: Rinse the Rice
slides.checkboxLabel: Rinse until water runs clear, drain thoroughly

items: Place rice in a bowl or fine-mesh strainer.
Rinse under cold water until the water runs mostly clear.
Drain thoroughly before adding to the pot.

body.html: Rinsing removes excess surface starch and keeps the rice fluffy instead of gummy.

slides.title: Toast the Rice
slides.checkboxLabel: Toast in oil 1–2 min until lightly steamy

items: Heat olive oil or butter in a pot over medium heat.
Stir for 1–2 minutes until lightly steamy and slightly nutty smelling.

body.html: You are not deeply browning the rice — just drying the surface slightly and coating the grains with fat.

slides.title: Cook
slides.checkboxLabel: Covered at low heat for 15 min — do not open lid

items: Add water or broth and salt to the pot.
Immediately cover and reduce heat to LOW.

body.html: Do not open the lid while cooking. Lifting it releases steam and disrupts the cook.

slides.title: Rest
slides.checkboxLabel: Heat off, lid on — rest 10 min

items: Leave the lid on undisturbed for 10 minutes.

body.html: This resting phase finishes the rice gently and allows remaining moisture to absorb evenly. Don't rush it.

slides.title: Finish
slides.checkboxLabel: Fluff, add lemon and herbs, taste and adjust

items: Fluff gently with a fork — don't stir or mash.
Add lemon zest, lemon juice, herbs, and a small drizzle of olive oil if desired.

body.html: Target: separate grains, light and fluffy, bright citrusy finish. Not sticky or wet.
This rice is built to pair with bold, savory mains and cool sauces.
